title: apatostelis pleistantha
side_effects: Apatostelis pleistantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting. Prolonged use can lead to more severe side effects, including kidney damage, respiratory problems, and in rare cases, seizures. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants, which can exacerbate existing health conditions. In some cases, improper use of Apatostelis pleistantha has been linked to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling.
